subject: Debate Fact Check: Minter Supports a Carbon Tax
body:
| | |
---

---|---
| **DEBATE FACT CHECK**

**SUE MINTER SUPPORTS A CARBON TAX**

**DEFINITELY SUPPORTS A BROAD REGIONAL CARBON TAX; AND PROBABLY WILL SIGN A STATE CARBON TAX **

**_Walks out of interview when pressed_**
_**Refuses to say she will oppose carbon tax legislation**_
**IN 2015, MINTER SAYS SHE’S ‘INTERESTED’ IN A REGIONAL CARBON TAX**
“Democratic candidate Sue Minter, the former secretary of the Vermont Agency of Transportation, said she would be interested in a regional carbon tax...”
[http://www.burlingtonfreepress.com/story/news/politics/2015/11/04/governor-candidates-disavow-carbon-tax/75150680/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8096eb2ffd&e=19cebfe173)

**MINTER TELLS THE VERMONT FARM BUREAU THAT SHE SUPPORTS A REGIONAL CARBON TAX**
“Minter supports a carbon tax. She supports it as part of a regional program for all of New England and supports a cap and trade program.” [http://vtfb.org/cms-assets/documents/253037-750536.phil-scott-and-sue-minter.pdf](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=daa50ccf80&e=19cebfe173)

**IN EARLY JULY, MINTER REITERATES SUPPORT FOR REGIONAL CARBON TAX**
“Candidates Peter Galbraith and former Vermont Transportation Secretary Sue Minter have spoken favorably of a regional or national tax on carbon...”
[http://www.burlingtonfreepress.com/story/news/politics/2016/07/07/carbon-tax-activists-pressure-vermont-candidates/86778128/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=909587c641&e=19cebfe173)

“Democrats Sue Minter and Peter Galbraith said they would back such a tax in Vermont, but only if other states in the region followed suit.” [http://vtdigger.org/2016/07/07/poll-finds-support-for-carbon-tax-other-climate-change-steps/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e78d4ee954&e=19cebfe173)

**LATER IN JULY, VTDIGGER REPORTS CARBON TAX DIVIDING GOV. HOPEFULS**
“Not surprisingly, the candidates were largely divided along party lines, with Democrats Matt Dunne, Galbraith and Minter all supporting some version of a carbon tax and investment in rural public transportation.” [http://vtdigger.org/2016/07/20/carbon-tax-one-issue-dividing-gubernatorial-hopefuls-in-debate/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7a201051ef&e=19cebfe173)

**PRESSED TO EXPLAIN HER POSITION, MINTER WALKS OUT ON INTERVIEW WHEN ASKED ABOUT CARBON TAX**
“When we asked Minter whether she supported a carbon tax on Tuesday morning she said she doesn't, but walked away from our interview before we could get all the details on her plan. ‘I think we've had plenty of time,’ said Minter. (Removes microphone and walks away.) [http://www.wcax.com/story/33438507/vt-governor-candidates-pressed-on-plans-for-growing-energy-jobs](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e916e46327&e=19cebfe173)

**LATER THAT DAY, MINTER REFUSES TO SAY IF SHE WILL SIGN A VT CARBON TAX**
Later Tuesday at our WCAX debate, Minter...stopped short of committing to a veto without knowing what a carbon tax bill would include. ‘Well, I will see what it is that they're talking about. There's no bill in front of me to answer,’ said Minter.” [http://www.wcax.com/story/33438507/vt-governor-candidates-pressed-on-plans-for-growing-energy-jobs](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=777f23709f&e=19cebfe173)

**MINTER CONTINUES TO SAY SHE ‘CURRENTLY’ DOESN’T SUPPORT IT BUT IMPLIES SUPPORT FOR LARGER REGIONAL TAX**
“Minter offered a more nuanced response...If she's governor and a carbon tax bill comes from the Legislature, ‘I will see what it is that they're talking about,’ Minter said.” [http://www.mcclatchydc.com/news/politics-government/national-politics/article110005512.html](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=64d3beba41&e=19cebfe173)

| Friend The time has come to muster the troops, as the old saying goes! There are only 14 more days remaining in what is the most important and consequential governor’s race in West Virginia history! Bill Cole has the momentum on his side! However, it is going to take the effort of every single one of his supporters – be they Democrat, Republican, or Independent – to help him across the finish line. I know that Bill is totally committed and will devote all his skills and determination into being the governor that West Virginia deserves! He will work across the aisle and has the vision that we need. Jim Justice has never laid out any straightforward plans for the future of West Virginia, only repeating the words “trust me” over and over. It is imperative that we stop him from becoming our next governor! I urge you to lend Bill your support by volunteering or donating, so that together, we can build that bright future worthy of our great state. Please, heed this call to volunteer your time! You can sign up today by clicking here or following this link right now: [http://www.billcolewv.com/volunteer](http://www.billcolewv.com/volunteer?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ann_worely&n=1) In the short time that is left, we can ensure that a commonsense, realistic, and far-sighted man becomes our state’s next chief executive! Ann Worley
Democrats for Cole Co-Chair [](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ann_worely&n=2 "Donate Today")

Friend -- I had to reach out before our Leave it All on the Field campaign ends and [**today 's TRIPLE-MATCH expires.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fieldgoals-dscc?refcode=DPE-20161025-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Unless we step up, our ground game won't stand a chance against Republican dark money. Just minutes ago, we got word that a single right-wing Super PAC is plowing $25 MILLION into seven make-or-break races.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: FW: Memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint
body:
Peter,

I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign
manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for
the White House and what we must do to lock in a win.

If you don't read the entire memo below, I've highlighted key
points that you NEED to know.

After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of
$100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to help us stay on track to win
just 13 days from today.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49327912:65R0D2mAN:m:3:1516426255:56D9C9B84D30AFC9DBA1CC166BB1E185:r

BEFORE donating, you'll also be able to indicate your preference
for the state we invest your contribution in.

TO: Peter
FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager
RE: Donald Trump's Path to 270 Electoral Votes

Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the
presidency. We've outlined a map to show where we currently stand
as well as the possible paths forward to win.

While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red
are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump.
Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call.

Over the past month, polls have shown us winning Iowa, Ohio,
Maine, Florida, Nevada, and North Carolina. If we maintain our
leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral
votes. Hillary can claim 193. But we'd still have 4 electoral
votes to go.

Polls show us close in New Hampshire, Colorado, and Pennsylvania.
Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory.

We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and
get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters
make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a
$140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to
victory.

###

Peter: with just 13 days left, we have a few paths to win. But
we'll need your continued support.

Because you've been such a critical supporter, you'll also be
able to share your preference on which state we should invest
your contribution in.

Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to
help us stay on track to win just 13 days from today.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49327912:65R0D2mAN:m:3:1516426255:56D9C9B84D30AFC9DBA1CC166BB1E185:r

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49327912:65R0D2mAN:m:3:1516426255:56D9C9B84D30AFC9DBA1CC166BB1E185:r

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are
not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint
fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J.
Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Join Our Thursday’s Live Stream Event
body:
A Conversation with Michael Wear & Alan Noble
| [View this email in your browser.](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vWz9io1uHN)
---|---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38366892:Wz9io1uHN:m:1:876315805:E6C305986C8861C9B244E332AC92E755:r)
---
| | **My Faith Votes
** presents
[My Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation with Michael Wear & Alan Noble](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38366892:Wz9io1uHN:m:1:876315805:E6C305986C8861C9B244E332AC92E755:r)
**Guest Host:** Johnnie Moore
**Date:** OCT 27TH
**Time:** 8PM (ET) / 5PM (PT)
_**In the midst of another divisive election and a political culture that thrives off of conflict, many Christians and other Americans are tempted to check out and claim the posture of a conscientious objector or to dig in for even greater political hostilities. Yet, as Christians, our faith has something essential to contribute in this moment.
**_
[ Join guest host Johnnie Moore for a conversation with Dr. Alan Noble and Michael Wear](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38366892:Wz9io1uHN:m:1:876315805:E6C305986C8861C9B244E332AC92E755:r), the co-founders of Public Faith, as we explore what it means for Christians to seek justice, love, mercy, and walk humbly with the Lord as we walk into the voting booth - especially when the leading candidates may not exemplify these Godly traits. Public Faith is a movement of Christians working to offer a consistent Christian witness during a chaotic political cycle.

Dr. Alan Noble is Co-Founder of Public Faith, Editor-in-Chief of the online magazine Christ and Pop Culture, and Assistant Professor of English at Oklahoma Baptist University. His writing has appeared on The Atlantic, Vox, and the Gospel Coalition.

Michael Wear is a Co-Founder of Public Faith and the Founder of Public Square Strategies LLC. He is the author of the forthcoming book, Reclaiming Hope: Lessons Learned in the Obama White House about the Future of Faith in America.

Guest host Johnnie Moore is the founder of The KAIROS Company, and a spokesperson for My Faith Votes. Johnnie is a bestselling author, speaker, humanitarian, and has written for many national news publications including CNN, The Washington Post, and Fox News.

This My Faith Matters LIVE Event is scheduled for **Thursday, October 27th at 8PM (ET) / 5PM (PT)** , and will be an [interactive call](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38366892:Wz9io1uHN:m:1:876315805:E6C305986C8861C9B244E332AC92E755:r) or you can watch the live video stream at [MyFaithVotes.org](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38366892:Wz9io1uHN:m:1:876315805:E6C305986C8861C9B244E332AC92E755:r) or [Facebook Live](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38366893:Wz9io1uHN:m:1:876315805:E6C305986C8861C9B244E332AC92E755:r).

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38366892:Wz9io1uHN:m:1:876315805:E6C305986C8861C9B244E332AC92E755:r)

My Faith Votes exists to inspire and motivate Jesus followers to vote. We are a non-partisan movement of the Church in America.

**My Faith Votes****
**presents
[ My Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation with Michael Wear & Alan Noble](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38366892:Wz9io1uHN:m:1:876315805:E6C305986C8861C9B244E332AC92E755:r)
**Guest Host:** Johnnie Moore
**Date:** OCT 27TH
**Time:** 8PM (ET) / 5PM (PT)[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38366894:Wz9io1uHN:m:1:876315805:E6C305986C8861C9B244E332AC92E755:r)

With Hillary Clinton dominating the airwaves thanks to her huge contributions from liberal elites, AND all her media friends lying about me on TV all day, our final ad blitz needs to be huge. Please contribute $35, $50 or $100 to help keep our ads on the air until the polls close November 8th. CONTRIBUTE $35 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Everyone who sees my ads will understand I alone can bring real change to D.C. And they will know I am 100% independent from the lobbyists and elites who have done severe damage to our country. name: Matt Rosendale
subject: Receive your ballot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt for Montana, PO Box 1538, Helena, MT 59624, Republican, Lorna Kuney, Treasurer |
body:
I wanted to reach out to make sure you received your absentee ballot. I would be honored to have your support in the race for State Auditor.
| |
---|---|---
|
[](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353079:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r) Fellow Montanan,

I wanted to reach out to make sure you received your absentee ballot. I would be honored to have your support in the race for State Auditor.

If you have not yet returned your ballot, a couple of items to note: 1) if you are returning your ballots by mail, the ballots require more than one first-class stamp; make sure to read the instructions for the exact amount. 2) if you do not mail your ballot before November 4th, [it may be best to hand deliver it to your county elections office](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353080:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r) or [polling location](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353081:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r) (on or before Election Day). 3) there are groups around Montana offering to pick-up and deliver your ballot for you--to maintain the integrity of your vote, I would recommend against allowing anyone to do this for you.

Now for the good news! We are winning but my opponent has outraised and is outspending us, nearly 3:1. [A recent poll shows us with a 10-point lead!](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353082:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r) **The Democrats are outraged and have really started to spend money, spreading lies in order to mislead you**. __I could really use your last minute support to put this race away!__ [_**Can you donate $50, $100, $200 or more today?**_](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353083:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r)

_My opponent has the backing of the insurance special interests in our state. These are the same folks who --similar to my opponent--lobbied the legislature to bring Obamacare to Montana._ _They succeeded and now you and I are paying the price_. Our insurance premiums are through the roof, deductibles are up and access to healthcare is down for many. __**All while my opponent's donors rake in huge bonuses and bankroll his campaign --nearly $40,000!**__

[Just this week, a new report confirmed double-digit Obamacare premium increases in store for next year!](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353084:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r) We need to fight back. I want to go to Helena to serve as your insurance commissioner to stand up to the special interests. [**But I can 't do it without your help!**](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353083:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r) The good news is, even with the special interests in his corner, we are winning. He has raised nearly three times the money, and yet we are winning. _We are winning because Montanans like you and me understand that government run healthcare is not the way to go._

_**As we enter the final stretch, your support is critical. If every person who receives this email would donate just $25, we would match my opponent's fundraising to date**_. [_**That means if you chip in $25 today, we can share our vision with the rest of Montana**_](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353083:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r).

Our vision is less government involvement, greater access to healthcare and more competition in the marketplace. More competition drives costs down and anyone who has ever owned or run a business knows that the less it costs to do business, the more you can grow your company and create good jobs for Montana.

That's what it's all about. [Your $25 can help us spread our message](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353083:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r). In case you missed it, _I was recently endorsed by the Montana Stockgrowers ' PAC (Montana Agricultural PAC), Montana Farm Bureau Federation and the Montana Association of REALTORS_. I am also very proud to announce that __**I am a 3-time Montana Chamber of Commerce "Champion of Business!"**__

**As this election cycle comes to a close, I would love to earn your support as well**. I look forward to serving as your next State Auditor. __Please remember to return your absentee ballot as soon as possible__.

Warm Regards,

[](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353083:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r)
Matt Rosendale

[PS--You can click here to make your donation of $25, $50, $100 or more securely online. Click here to chip in! ](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353083:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r) |
| | [](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38353083:smyp71uNQ:m:1:1443712213:ABB60A7EA8227A0730936C84DB3CA2D0:r)
---|---|---
|
Paid for by Matt for Montana, PO Box 1538, Helena, MT 59624, Republican, Lorna Kuney, Treasurer |
---|---|---

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eric=20Trump?=
subject: Join my father's movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
We need you on the team. |

Friend, While Hillary Clinton and the Democrats continue their lies and vicious attacks against my father, our supporters are spreading our vision of a more prosperous and secure future for all Americans. This Saturday, thousands of our supporters will be out canvassing neighborhoods, making face-to-face contact with hundreds of thousands of voters all across your state the country, spreading my father’s winning message. They’ve each committed to knock 50 targeted doors in their neighborhoods because they know how important it is to reach every voter in your state with the truth about the clear choice in this election. Now with less than 50 days to go, I need you to join to the movement. Right now we’re at a crucial crossroads: We need more supporters out in their neighborhoods or we won’t be able to account for every door, and critical voters will go unreached. My father needs you to go above and beyond at this pivotal moment in the campaign. Will you commit to knock 50 doors in your neighborhood this Saturday? You have a unique opportunity to personally influence this election. We can’t afford to leave our future to chance. Let’s Make America Great Again, Eric Trump

Now with less than 50 days to go, I need you to join to the movement.
---------------------------------------------------------------------
http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfbaV4~BADSIlB-jPtaJW3bDRMN6aaaaJW3bBMBBMIia?p=7@y639v6&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=c&2=

YES! I'll Commit to 50 Doors!

Right now we’re at a crucial crossroads: We need more supporters out in their neighborhoods or we won’t be able to account for every door, and critical voters will go unreached. My father needs you to go above and beyond at this pivotal moment in the campaign. Will you commit to knock 50 doors in your neighborhood this Saturday? You have a unique opportunity to personally influence this election. We can’t afford to leave our future to chance. Let’s Make America Great Again, Eric Trump Now with less than 50 days to go, I need you to join to the movement. = Will you commit to knock 50 doors in your neighborhood this Saturday? = YES! name: Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: Our Path Forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Prepared by my campaign manager. Please read to see our path forward. |
[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAwLTM4YjIwYTlmNDdiNDRkYmY5MzNkZDE5NDA0ZGQxOTJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS90b28tY2xvc2UtdG8tY2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SkZDX2RpcmVjdC1hc2tfdG9vLWNsb3NlLXRvLWNhbGwmYWRkaXRpb25hbFt1dG1fY29udGVudF09Q0MtTFktMTAyNjE2LWRqdC1tZW1vLWluaC1qZmMtcHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wX0NDX0xZJmFtb3VudD0xMDA&K=xjnknND_SuNJpbVcAlJTnA)

Friend,

I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for the White House and what we must do to lock in a win.

If you don't read the entire memo below, I've highlighted key points that you NEED to know.

[**After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to help us stay on track to win just 13 days from today.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAwLTM4YjIwYTlmNDdiNDRkYmY5MzNkZDE5NDA0ZGQxOTJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS90b28tY2xvc2UtdG8tY2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SkZDX2RpcmVjdC1hc2tfdG9vLWNsb3NlLXRvLWNhbGwmYWRkaXRpb25hbFt1dG1fY29udGVudF09Q0MtTFktMTAyNjE2LWRqdC1tZW1vLWluaC1qZmMtcHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wX0NDX0xZJmFtb3VudD0xMDA&K=wo_RnzkCUGQja4ziZ1oAdw)

BEFORE donating, you'll also be able to indicate your preference for the state we invest your contribution in.

TO: Friend
FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager
RE: Donald Trump's Path to 270 Electoral Votes

Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the presidency. We've outlined a map to show where we currently stand as well as the possible paths forward to win.

While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump. Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call.
[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAwLTM4YjIwYTlmNDdiNDRkYmY5MzNkZDE5NDA0ZGQxOTJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS90b28tY2xvc2UtdG8tY2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SkZDX2RpcmVjdC1hc2tfdG9vLWNsb3NlLXRvLWNhbGwmYWRkaXRpb25hbFt1dG1fY29udGVudF09Q0MtTFktMTAyNjE2LWRqdC1tZW1vLWluaC1qZmMtcHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wX0NDX0xZJmFtb3VudD0xMDA&K=ubPr5RL2BSx13JKPC12FMA)

Over the past month, polls have _shown us winning_ **Iowa, Ohio, Maine, Florida, Nevada,** and**North Carolina.** If we maintain our leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral votes. Hillary can claim 193. _**But we 'd still have 4 electoral votes to go.**_

Polls show us _close_ in **New** **Hampshire** , **Colorado** , and **Pennsylvania**. Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory.

We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a $140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to victory.

###

Friend: with just 13 days left, we have a few paths to win. But we'll need your continued support.

**Because you 've been such a critical supporter, you'll also be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in.**

[**Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to help us stay on track to win just 13 days from today.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAwLTM4YjIwYTlmNDdiNDRkYmY5MzNkZDE5NDA0ZGQxOTJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS90b28tY2xvc2UtdG8tY2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SkZDX2RpcmVjdC1hc2tfdG9vLWNsb3NlLXRvLWNhbGwmYWRkaXRpb25hbFt1dG1fY29udGVudF09Q0MtTFktMTAyNjE2LWRqdC1tZW1vLWluaC1qZmMtcHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wX0NDX0xZJmFtb3VudD0xMDA&K=4EcbT4NovQLmmFoyoDTX_g)

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAwLTM4YjIwYTlmNDdiNDRkYmY5MzNkZDE5NDA0ZGQxOTJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS90b28tY2xvc2UtdG8tY2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SkZDX2RpcmVjdC1hc2tfdG9vLWNsb3NlLXRvLWNhbGwmYWRkaXRpb25hbFt1dG1fY29udGVudF09Q0MtTFktMTAyNjE2LWRqdC1tZW1vLWluaC1qZmMtcHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wX0NDX0xZJmFtb3VudD0xMDA&K=xlEmCqP9kt-Uf1iJS-nPTg)**

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

subject: Why we started this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Despite the liberal media and crooked Hillary’s best efforts to throw him off track, my dad has made us proud – now let’s make him proud. |

Friend, Despite the best efforts of crooked Hillary and the liberal media to twist his words, corrupt his hugely successful business record, and slander him personally, my dad has made our family so proud throughout this campaign. And last week on the debate stage I know he made you proud too as he stood up for our constitution, the unborn, and the Americans across this country who Hillary calls “deplorable” simply for disagreeing with her. And when he is President, my father is going to make America proud. And he is going to Make America Great Again. But we can’t get there without your help. With only 13 days remaining until election day, the media and Hillary’s team are working together to throw everything they have at my father – nothing is off limits and they will stop at nothing to stop our movement. We won’t stop either. Our team is going to be working tirelessly until the last vote is cast on election day – too much is on the line to take our foot off the gas now. These final days are the MOST critical in the entire election, and we HAVE TO finish strong. That’s why I am personally asking that you renew your commitment with a donation of ANY AMOUNT you can afford. YES, I can help Donald finish strong. CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $75 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Remember, this campaign is built on people like YOU. My father hasn’t spent the last 30 years building relationships with big-wig donors and Washington elites like Hillary – instead, he was building one of the most successful companies in our country today. That means we are relying on patriotic Americans like YOU who are sick and tired of the liberal media and the DC establishment running our country into the ground. We need a strong showing from supporters like YOU right away to fund the critical Voter Outreach efforts in the final days of this campaign. Friend, there is no doubt that with this campaign we have started a movement. We can’t stop now. Let’s make sure that we finish strong. My dad has made us so proud, now let’s make him proud by helping to ensure we are able to finish strong. Contribute ANY AMOUNT you can afford right away. Thank you, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

Contribute ANY AMOUNT you can afford right away. CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Listening
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
I love traveling around the great state of Wisconsin and hearing people's stories. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4659/1c469400/1f62252/35427af/1642042473/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom1&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- I love traveling across the great state of Wisconsin and hearing people's stories. That's how we launched our campaign: by traveling to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties and meeting people where they are. We've logged over 70,000 miles on the campaign van, and with less than two weeks until the election, we're not slowing down. I'm not taking anything for granted. Our supporters are working night and day to reach more voters. You won't find a group of volunteers that works harder. I'm proud of the campaign we've built together. I'm proud that we take the time to listen to one another. That's what's been missing in politics for far too long: Listening. Election Day is less than two weeks away, and our last end-of-month deadline is at midnight on October 31\. The most recent financial reports show that Senator Johnson's campaign has around $600,000 more cash on hand than ours -- cash they can spend at a moment's notice. Help us close the gap. The money we raise will be put to immediate use in our final get-out-the-vote push. I'm asking you to step up once again to help us get there. **[Will you contribute $5 today to help us raise $600,000 by midnight on October 31?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4659/1c469400/1f62252/35427af/1642042473/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom1&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4659/1c469400/1f62252/35427af/1642042473/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom1&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4659/1c469400/1f62252/35427af/1642042473/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom1&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4659/1c469400/1f62252/35427ac/1642042473/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---

---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4659/1c469400/1f62252/35427aa/1642042473/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4659/1c469400/1f62252/35427ab/1642042473/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/oct-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-26_oct_eom1_nd&utm_campaign=oct_eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")

Election Day is close, but there's still time to make an impact. I'm going to keep campaigning -- and listening to the people of Wisconsin -- until the very end.
Thank you for all you're doing. Now, let's go win!
Sincerely,
Russ Feingold

name: Lisa Bullock
subject: I wanted to share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

As this campaign season has become increasingly dispiriting, **I wanted to share a family photo from this past weekend.**

Steve, the kids and I went out talking to Montanans door to door. And what people were eager to discuss wasn't all the mudslinging -- our conversations focused on good public schools, supporting small businesses, access to public lands and keeping taxes fair for working families.

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Cu%2B0wCC9%2FUnAyM3UD2X%2F237ejhPjg9TI)
---

**For us, this election isn 't political -- it's personal.** We want to make sure we're passing on an even better Montana to our kids and to future generations.

Steve has his final deadline of this race tomorrow at midnight. **He needs your help to ensure his campaign has the resources to highlight what really matters in these last few days.[Please donate $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=McnpRMc6Gjc00CVGecLTNX7ejhPjg9TI)**

Thank you,

Lisa Bullock
****
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Dfp1V%2BUz%2F7JlBjF30QP6cH7ejhPjg9TI)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ZaQsjUHG%2BayV32jhUxfUyH7ejhPjg9TI).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---

name: Amy Lunde, Greg for Montana
subject: Dark money allies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

Friend,
With less than 2 weeks to go,
Greg's opponents have spent nearly $6 million against him- that
what we know of!
Will you pitch in $15 to help us
fight back?

Steve Bullock has accepted over
$250,000 in PAC money from special interest groups and dark money
allies. The dark money he helped raise as chairman of the
Democratic Governors Association has been funneled right back to
Montana in attack ads against Greg!

While we don't know exactly how
much they're willing to spend to hurt Greg, we know they'll say
anything to turn the attention off of Steve Bullock's failed
record.

Look at the facts:

Bullock deleted all his
emails over 4 years as Attorney General
Bullock gave out no-bid and
multi-million dollar contracts to friends and family members
Bullock's increased spending
by $800 million as Governor
Bullock paid out nearly $1M
in "hush money" to silence state employees and cover up misdeeds.

We don't need any more lies or
corruption in the governor's office. We need a proven job
creator like Greg Gianforte.

Can you rush just $15 to help us
fight the dark money groups? Together, we can win this!

Thank you,

Amy Lunde
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

body:
|

Fellow Conservative,

Things are looking tough for conservatives.

Hillary Clinton, Bernie Sanders, Barack Obama and Nancy Pelosi are all focused on one goal right now: **a total liberal takeover of Washington.**

All the big name Democrats know everything comes down to the campaign's final stretch.

Election Day may be 13 days away -- **but our success will be determined by what we do right now.**

If the conservative grassroots base steps up right now, then we'll stop liberals from crushing us in the election's final week.

**Help protect the GOP Congress - our last line of defense against Clinton's liberal agenda.**

**TRIPLE-MATCH STATUS: ACTIVE**

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
It’s time to deliver a victory for the American people. |

Friend, Every day I wake up determined to deliver a better life for the people all across this nation that have been ignored, neglected and abandoned. I have visited the laid-off factory workers, and the communities crushed by our horrible and unfair trade deals. These are the forgotten men and women of our country. People who work hard but no longer have a voice. Help Me Fight. Let’s Win a Great Victory For America on November 8th Please SUPPORT Donald J. Trump For President TODAY. I have embraced crying mothers who have lost their children because our politicians put their personal agendas before the national good. I have no patience for injustice, no tolerance for government incompetence, no sympathy for leaders who fail their citizens. When innocent people suffer, because our political system lacks the will, or the courage, or the basic decency to enforce our laws -- or worse still, has sold out to some corporate lobbyist for cash -- we must not look the other way. Help Me Fight. Let’s Win a Great Victory For America on November 8th Please SUPPORT Donald J. Trump For President TODAY. My crooked opponent raked in millions of dollars trading access and favors to special interests and foreign powers. I know the time for action has come -- this may be our last chance to win the White House and end the globalist elite-supported special interest corruption of our politics. Friend, I have had a truly great life in business -- but now, my sole and exclusive mission is to go to work for our country -- to go to work for you. It’s time to deliver a victory for the American people. But to do that, I need the rock-solid support of every freedom-loving citizen who wants to see their government finally put the interests of the American people first today. I'm asking for your support today so that I can be your champion in the White House -- can I count on your generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, or even $100 or more right now to help ensure we finish this historic campaign strong and win a new birth for American freedom and prosperity? Friend, my opponent asks her supporters to recite a three-word loyalty pledge. It reads: “I’m With Her.” I choose to recite a different pledge. My pledge reads: “I’M WITH YOU -- THE AMERICAN PEOPLE.” I am your voice. I’m with you, I will fight for you, with your indispensable support, I will win for you -- and We Will Make America Great Again. Thank you and God bless, Donald J. Trump Help Me Fight. Let’s Win a Great Victory For America on November 8th Please SUPPORT Donald J. Trump For President TODAY.

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

I really hate to lose, team.
But our race here in New Hampshire will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and a poll released just yesterday shows that thanks to the $50 MILLION and counting in spending from Ayotte's special interest backers, if the election were held today, we would LOSE.
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb73/2a380d31/178ec432/ffd30c/4168709847/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibGFzdC1tYXRjaCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDI2X1VNYXNzUG9sbE1hdGNoX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/last-match?refcode=e20161026_UMassPollMatch_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

clean_body: "" "" I really hate to lose, team. But our race here in New Hampshire will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and a poll released just yesterday shows that thanks to the $50 MILLION and counting in spending from Ayotte's special interest backers, if the election were held today, we would LOSE. "" With just 13 days left, we're running out of time to pull ahead. That's why a group of generous donors has stepped up to DOUBLE online gifts, but only if we hit our $21,550 goal by Friday. Our records indicate that you may be able to help us take the lead with a $3 donation. Please, I'm asking you directly: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" We're not kidding when we say that your gift now, during this match campaign, could be the difference between winning here in New Hampshire and handing Senate control to Washington Republicans. With the Senate majority and our next Supreme Court justices on the line, there is too much at stake to wake up on November 9 wishing we had done just a little bit more. "" Thanks for being a team player, Marc Goldberg Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH ""

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=e8c95378c2&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | Friend

Have you seen the endorsements we've been getting? We know that when voters see our message they support our vision for Washington - we just need reach out to them. With just two weeks until Election Day we need your help spreading the word. Can you [******contribute $25, $100, or even $350**](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=c4c8fc9838&e=32f1a3df98) to help us get messages like these in front of voters?
****** ** ******
****Bill Bryant** ****** **
"We agree that Bryant’s assertion that Inslee has not brought the force of the governor’s office to resolving the issue of K-12 education funding."

"Bryant also wants a whole new look at budgeting that focuses on the state’s priorities and develops a longer-range outlook than is being done now."

"We like Bryant’s focus on education, his approach to budgeting and — as a Republican — his ability to work with Democrats on Seattle port issues. He has the capabilities to be a strong governor at a time when leadership is at a premium."

"It’s time for a change in Washington’s Capitol. It’s time for someone who knows and understands agriculture, trade and business... That candidate is Bill Bryant."
"The state needs a fresh leader who can actively engage the Legislature on the tough issues ahead. We think Bryant has the energy, the intelligence and the right priorities."

"Bryant is the antithesis of the GOP suits you see on TV. He is an outdoorsman, a hiker and fly fisherman, a guy who revels in verbal give and take rather than repeating puerile sound bites."

"If you believe in opening the windows of state government, and shaking up its bureaucracy, he's your guy."

"[Inslee] is great at grandstanding, showing up with furrowed brow at the scene of disasters, but far less skilled at the close-quarters work of hammering out solutions."

"Bill Bryant as Governor would bring fresh air and fresh perspectives to a state government mired in atrophy, and would be tonic to a Republican Party stuck in anti-government jargon and anti-environmental extremism."

"We also like his vision. Bryant appears to be a strategist who looks ahead several years, sets goals and figures out ways to meet them. Such pro-active planning from the governor’s chair would be refreshing."

"The Washington state governor’s race is a choice between an incumbent who has made politics a career and a feisty challenger who wants to bring a fresh approach to state government. We think it’s time to give the outsider a chance. We support Republican Bill Bryant."
"He is a problem-solver and that has us swayed."
"Washington state needs the leadership and vision Republican Bill Bryant would bring as governor."

"We believe Bryant has the potential to do an outstanding job as the state’s chief executive."

"Bryant’s background, business acumen, depth of knowledge of public policy issues and his ability to work well with Republicans and Democrats (which he has done as Seattle Port Commissioner) make him an excellent candidate for governor." ********
---

---

_" Katie McGinty has the principles and grit to take on the tough fights and win. I know she will stand with us -- and she will be a progressive ally in the Senate to fix the broken system."_
_\- Elizabeth Warren_ Wow -- Katie just got off stage with Senator Elizabeth Warren after talking to folks in Pittsburgh, and they are FIRED UP!

Here's the problem: This race is neck-and-neck -- within the __margin of error__ in the polls -- and if they're going to fight together for working families on the Senate floor, they need __our help__ to make sure Katie wins!

[**Can you pitch in $5 to help Katie win this race? There are just 13 short days left until Election Day, and every dollar is CRITICAL to keeping our campaign competitive until the end.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4294363810145239040/-632166409413066752?refcode=e20161026.2&refcode2=e20161026.2nd&amount=25)

We're up against Pat Toomey, the "Wall Street Senator" himself. His political machine is fueled by BIG-money donations from right-wing special interests and Super PACs. It's no wonder -- they know that when it comes down to it, he'll always put their interests first in the Senate.

We've had enough of Pat Toomey -- and so has Elizabeth Warren. We have 13 days to do something about it. [**Quick, let 's make them count. Pitch in >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4294363810145239040/-632166409413066752?refcode=e20161026.2&refcode2=e20161026.2nd&amount=25)

It's anyone's game --

Team Katie

There are only 13 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/4294363810145239040/-632166409413066752?refcode=e20161026.2&refcode2=e20161026.2nd&amount=25)**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: Our Path Forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint
body:
Peter,

I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign
manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for
the White House and what we must do to lock in a win.

If you don't read the entire memo below, I've highlighted key
points that you NEED to know.

After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of
$100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to help us stay on track to win
just 13 days from today.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49340319:Js6gz2m-N:m:3:1516426255:5A2634623284BCA4F4C00D798CE6E007:r

BEFORE donating, you'll also be able to indicate your preference
for the state we invest your contribution in.

TO: Peter
FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager
RE: Donald Trump's Path to 270 Electoral Votes

Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the
presidency. We've outlined a map to show where we currently stand
as well as the possible paths forward to win.

While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red
are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump.
Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call.

Over the past month, polls have shown us winning Iowa, Ohio,
Maine, Florida, Nevada, and North Carolina. If we maintain our
leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral
votes. Hillary can claim 193. But we'd still have 4 electoral
votes to go.

Polls show us close in New Hampshire, Colorado, and Pennsylvania.
Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory.

We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and
get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters
make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a
$140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to
victory.

###

Peter: with just 13 days left, we have a few paths to win. But
we'll need your continued support.

Because you've been such a critical supporter, you'll also be
able to share your preference on which state we should invest
your contribution in.

Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to
help us stay on track to win just 13 days from today.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49340319:Js6gz2m-N:m:3:1516426255:5A2634623284BCA4F4C00D798CE6E007:r

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49340319:Js6gz2m-N:m:3:1516426255:5A2634623284BCA4F4C00D798CE6E007:r

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are
not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint
fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J.
Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are
not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint
fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J.
Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Click here if you would prefer to not receive future emails from
the Trump Make America Great Again Committee.

http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJs6gz2m-N

Click here to contact us with any questions or concerns.

mailto:response@getupstream.com

You can view this email in your web browser here.

https://email.vervemail.com/p/vJs6gz2m-N

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: debate (tonight)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e41/738133e4/326a1ec0/7f859060/671115411/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161026pm?refcode=pme161026pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| We've gotten a lot of good news lately.

Four recent polls from _Reuters_ , _CBS News/YouGov_ , _Fox 13/Opinion Savvy_ , and _Quinnipiac_ all show our race in a statistical tie. We just got a huge endorsement from the _New York Times_. And Rachel Maddow thinks this race is winnable for us.

**But good news doesn 't get us to 50%+1 on Election Day.** Hard work does. And we only have another 13 days to get that work done.

Today is the second debate of this race. I'll work as hard as I can to make the stakes of this race clear on that stage. **And I need to know you 're ready to do the work necessary to win in these last 13 days.**

**The finance team tells me we need $20,000 by midnight to stay on point.[_Will you stand with me today by rushing in a contribution?_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e41/738133e4/326a1ec0/7f859060/671115411/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161026pm?refcode=pme161026pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**

Each and every dollar we bring in right now is important. Money helps us keep ads on the air, staff on the ground, and our get out the vote efforts going.

I'll be on stage tonight, calling out Marco Rubio for the special interest puppet he is. And while I'm up there, I need to know that all of you are with me.

**This is the most important time in this campaign. Please don 't let it pass us by. [_Give whatever you can to help us hit this $20,000 goal by midnight._](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e41/738133e4/326a1ec0/7f859060/671115411/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161026pm?refcode=pme161026pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**

Thank you so much for all that you do.

Patrick |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e41/738133e4/326a1ec0/7f859061/671115411/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e41/738133e4/326a1ec0/7f859062/671115411/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Van Hollen HQ
subject: before the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
We need to make sure people go to the polls to have their voices heard during the week of Early Voting, which starts this Thursday, and on Election Day, November 8th. |
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a92/70cdc2ba/47375992/397b5ca/2139636880/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092816_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em102616_1&source=em102616_1") Friend, Chris has another debate today with his Republican opponent and once again he will be talking about how we can turn Marylanders priorities into action in the U.S. Senate.

We're reaching out to all of our top supporters to let you know that you can cheer Chris on tonight at 7pm on WJZ-13 CBS-Baltimore.

Friend, there are less than two weeks until election day. We are getting close to the finish line. Before the debate begins we want Chris to know you're standing with him. [**Add your name and commit to vote for Chris as our next Senator!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a92/70cdc2ba/47375992/397b5cb/2139636880/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris-early-voting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+and+commit+to+vote+for+Chr&utm_campaign=em102616_1&source=em102616_1") [Add Your Name](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a92/70cdc2ba/47375992/397b5c8/2139636880/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris-early-voting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Add+Your+Name&utm_campaign=em102616_1&source=em102616_1") When Marylanders head to the polls tomorrow for early voting, we're glad to know they'll have had one more opportunity to hear about Chris's long record of standing up to special interests, whether its Wall Street banks, the NRA, or Tea Party extremists in Congress and delivering real results for the people of Maryland.

We know that he is the leader we need to move Maryland forward, but he cannot win without you. [**Please commit to vote for Chris before early voting starts tomorrow.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a92/70cdc2ba/47375992/397b5c9/2139636880/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris-early-voting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Please+commit+to+vote+for+Chris+before+e&utm_campaign=em102616_1&source=em102616_1")

Thank you for standing with Chris,

Team Van Hollen

P.S. Tune in to WJZ-13 tonight at 7pm to watch the debate!
---

name: Team Ross
subject: BREAKING: Burr's duel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| **" Burr's North Carolina duel could determine whether Republicans keep the Senate"**
\- _Washington Post_ , 10/25/2016 Republicans' grip on the Senate majority is tenuous. It's a rapidly fraying thread, and they're hoping it won't snap.

**But it will if Deborah wins.** Republicans can't afford to lose North Carolina. Which explains why the National Republican Senatorial Committee rushed a $2 million ad buy in North Carolina over the last two weeks of this election.

**It 's part of a $15 million line of credit the NRSC took out as a last-ditch effort to save the GOP majority.**

[_**Republicans never thought they would be playing defense in North Carolina. Now, because of Deborah, they have no choice. Let 's finish what we started. Give $5 to help Deborah win.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427ac/2cc31c44/55007e4/19f9a705/3499261072/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161026?refcode=dre161026_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Nothing in this race is certain anymore. Burr even told a group of supporters at a fundraiser that he's "in the race of his life."

Everyone is holding their breath to see which party takes control of the Senate. The suspense will end on Election Day. And as the east coast returns roll in, we can make sure North Carolina goes for Deborah.

[_**But she needs our help now. This race is a dead heat. We have to fend off Republicans ' late spending surge. Chip in $5 or $10 if you can.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427ac/2cc31c44/55007e4/19f9a705/3499261072/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161026?refcode=dre161026_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team Ross |

name: Bill Cole
subject: Vote Early Starting Today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| | Friend -- Early voting begins today in West Virginia! What does this mean for you? Skip the long lines on Election Day and cast your ballot just as you would on November 8th. You can continue to vote early through November 5th! **[Click here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.sos.wv.gov%2Felections%2Fvote%2Fearlyvoting%2Fpages%2Fdefault.aspx&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ev&n=1 "Early Voting")** or use this link to find your early voting polling location: http://www.sos.wv.gov/elections/vote/earlyvoting/pages/default.aspx We have a real opportunity to get West Virginia back on track, but in order to do that, we need to get every supporter to the polls if we're going to be victorious on Election Day! Thanks for supporting me, Bill Cole

body:
People love this – it’s an easy way help me WIN on November 8th. Don’t wait. |

Friend, My son Eric came up with this idea, and we’ve had tremendous success with it so far. But I still don’t have your name on the list. I hope you’ll join today. The idea is simple: If every one of my supporters contributes $20.17 to our final television ad and get-out-the-vote campaign, we’ll blow Crooked Hillary’s fundraising advantage out of the water and WIN. And a $20.17 one-time contribution stands for something so much bigger. 2017 is the year that we can finally end the corrupt insider system in Washington and Make America Great Again! JOIN today with a $20.17 special contribution to help me win huge on Election Day, so I can get to work for you as President of the United States. CONTRIBUTE $20.17 TO TRUMP VICTORY The Trump movement has shattered Republican grassroots fundraising records, with more than 2.6 million donors, and we can’t let up now. We need you on board. Crooked Hillary receives MILLIONS from the political elites, the lobbyists, the Wall Street banks and the special interests – you know they’ll do anything to stop me from succeeding and shutting down their rigged system. Every morning, Eric sends me a list of those who’ve joined with a $20.17 special contribution. I hope to see your name on the list tomorrow. Please help us close this race strong and Make America Great Again – with 13 days to go I need EVERYONE to get involved. Best wishes, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $20.17 TO TRUMP VICTORY

clean_body: "" "" "" Friends -- Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight recently reported a New Hampshire voter is 16 times more likely to determine control of the Senate than the average American voter. If Democrats are going to take back the Senate, we HAVE to win here in New Hampshire. But outside groups have spent more than $50 million to stop Governor Maggie Hassan, and a recent poll shows us DOWN. We're running out of time to pull ahead, team. That's why a group of generous donors is MATCHING online gifts until midnight Friday to win in New Hampshire and take back the Senate -- but ONLY if we hit our $21,550 goal. name: Dan Parker, Senior Adviser
subject: no one is immune (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ba/7be36b49/1e78ba32/78f9d20a/3211951707/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

The numbers surrounding Hoosiers living with Alzheimer's are staggering.
* **110,000** \-- The number of Indiana residents currently living with Alzheimer's Disease
* **130,000** \-- The number of Indiana residents expected to be living with Alzheimer's by 2025
* **330,000** \-- The number of Hoosiers taking care of someone living with Alzheimer's Disease

These numbers are only going to continue to rise, unless we take action now.

**[Will you stand with Evan and call on Congress to allocate more resources to fight Alzheimer's? We can't stop until we have a cure.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ba/7be36b49/1e78ba32/78f9d209/3211951707/VEsE/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/stand-with-evan-to-put-an-end-to-alzheimer-s-")**

Alzheimer's is a devastating disease both for the person living with the disease and their family. When Evan was in the Senate, he spoke to many Hoosiers whose families were affected. But Evan didn't just listen to their stories -- he went to work to help them by collaborating with Republican Senator Susan Collins to pass legislation that coordinated America's response to Alzheimer's.

**That kind of collaboration is desperately needed in Congress today -- especially if we ever hope to do more for our seniors and their families.**

**[Will you stand with Evan to call on Congress to work together to help Americans fight Alzheimer's?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ba/7be36b49/1e78ba32/78f9d209/3211951707/VEsF/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/stand-with-evan-to-put-an-end-to-alzheimer-s-")**

Evan knows first-hand how challenging it is to watch a loved one struggle with a devastating disease. His mother died of cancer at the age of 46. Evan is committed to helping Hoosier families dealing with loved ones' serious health issues -- and to fighting to cure diseases like Alzheimer's.

**[Add your name to stand with him and help put an end to Alzheimer's.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ba/7be36b49/1e78ba32/78f9d209/3211951707/VEsC/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/stand-with-evan-to-put-an-end-to-alzheimer-s-")**

Thanks,

Dan Parker
Senior Adviser [Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ba/7be36b49/1e78ba32/78f9d208/3211951707/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161026&amount=25")
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ba/7be36b49/1e78ba32/78f9d20f/3211951707/VEsA/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: No Senate race is more important.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
We cannot afford to lose Wisconsin. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf465a/1c469400/1f257ee/35424b8/3925100307/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-warren?utm_source=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&utm_campaign=ew&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Back when I was a law school professor trying to stop the big banks and credit card companies from cheating people, there were giants in the U.S. Senate -- champions who fought for working families. Ted Kennedy. Paul Wellstone. Russ Feingold. We can't bring Ted or Paul's powerful voices back to Washington (not a day goes by that I don't wish we could). But this November, we _can_ bring Russ Feingold's voice back to Washington -- back to fight side-by-side with a growing progressives caucus, side-by-side with Bernie Sanders and Al Franken and Sherrod Brown and Jeff Merkley and Tammy Baldwin -- back to fight for the people of Wisconsin and people all across this country. **But I'm uneasy, friend. Tw o weeks out, the polls in Wisconsin are closer than they've ever been -- some within the margin of error. We cannot afford to lose Wisconsin. No Senate race is more important than Russ Feingold's.** [**What do you say: Can we raise $25,000 for Russ by midnight tonight? Please donate directly to Russ Feingold's campaign right now so he can immediately fight back against the right-wing attacks.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf465a/1c469400/1f257ee/35424b8/3925100307/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-warren?utm_source=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&utm_campaign=ew&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf465a/1c469400/1f257ee/35424b9/3925100307/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-warren?utm_source=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&utm_campaign=ew&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf465a/1c469400/1f257ee/35424b6/3925100307/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-warren?utm_source=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&utm_campaign=ew&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf465a/1c469400/1f257ee/35424b7/3925100307/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-warren?utm_source=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&utm_campaign=ew&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf465a/1c469400/1f257ee/35424b4/3925100307/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-warren?utm_source=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&utm_campaign=ew&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Russ has been leading in every poll for months and months -- and frankly, most people assumed he was on his way to victory.
What's happened? With the Republicans on the verge of losing the Senate, the right-wing Super PACs are making a last-ditch effort to save their radical Tea Party Senator Ron Johnson. Russ is getting massively outspent on the airwaves in Wisconsin with nasty attack ads by a group connected to Governor Scott Walker.
I've seen the energy and excitement on the ground in Wisconsin. I know that folks are ready to send Russ to the Senate, and I know he's got the grassroots campaign to make it happen. But we can't afford to let Russ get creamed on TV by powerful interests and not have the resources to answer back.
[**Russ has always stood up for us, and now we need to fight for Russ. Send my friend -- and our longtime champion -- Russ Feingold to the United States Senate. Donate right now to help him fight back.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf465a/1c469400/1f257ee/35424b8/3925100307/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-warren?utm_source=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&utm_campaign=ew&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf465a/1c469400/1f257ee/35424b8/3925100307/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-warren?utm_source=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&refcode=ema_2016-10-25_ew_nd_rs&utm_campaign=ew&utm_medium=ema")

Philadelphia PA 19110 United States
clean_body: In case you haven't seen the news recently: This race is closer than close. The latest Washington Post/SurveyMonkey poll shows Katie TIED with Pat Toomey, 47% to 47%. And Nate Silver's team called Pennsylvania THE tipping point state of the entire election! That means OUR RACE is the one which will decide whether the Democrats win back the Senate majority. Don 't wait until it's too late! Everything we do has an outsized importance and October's end-of-month goal is our last and our most important. With just THIRTEEN DAYS (!!) left until E-Day, we're frantically pulling together all the final pieces of this campaign. Polls. Field reports. Phone calls. Canvassers. And the most important piece of all: YOU. You -- yes, you -- are a CRITICAL part of Katie's victory on November 8th. It's this grassroots team that has given our campaign the horsepower to get to this point, but we can't take our foot of the gas now. Not when it's this close. No regrets, Team Katie | * A note on donations There are only 13 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate? Chip in $5 today. Thank you. ** | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

body:
Prepared by my campaign manager. Please read to see our path forward. |
[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAwLWVhZjVhZTU5ZGUxMDQwOTY4ODQzYTIxMGEwYzY5ZDAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS90b28tY2xvc2UtdG8tY2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SkZDX2RpcmVjdC1hc2tfdG9vLWNsb3NlLXRvLWNhbGwmYWRkaXRpb25hbFt1dG1fY29udGVudF09Q0MtTFktMTAyNjE2LWRqdC1tZW1vLWluaC1qZmMtcHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wX0NDX0xZJmFtb3VudD0xMDA&K=_q8QE8N5D3bg4O4LRGOfHg)

Friend,

I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for the White House and what we must do to lock in a win.

If you don't read the entire memo below, I've highlighted key points that you NEED to know.

[**After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to help us stay on track to win just 13 days from today.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAwLWVhZjVhZTU5ZGUxMDQwOTY4ODQzYTIxMGEwYzY5ZDAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS90b28tY2xvc2UtdG8tY2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SkZDX2RpcmVjdC1hc2tfdG9vLWNsb3NlLXRvLWNhbGwmYWRkaXRpb25hbFt1dG1fY29udGVudF09Q0MtTFktMTAyNjE2LWRqdC1tZW1vLWluaC1qZmMtcHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wX0NDX0xZJmFtb3VudD0xMDA&K=xotOVDKSAbq31QiXNuxruw)

BEFORE donating, you'll also be able to indicate your preference for the state we invest your contribution in.

TO: Friend
FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager
RE: Donald Trump's Path to 270 Electoral Votes

Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the presidency. We've outlined a map to show where we currently stand as well as the possible paths forward to win.

While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump. Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call.
[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAwLWVhZjVhZTU5ZGUxMDQwOTY4ODQzYTIxMGEwYzY5ZDAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS90b28tY2xvc2UtdG8tY2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SkZDX2RpcmVjdC1hc2tfdG9vLWNsb3NlLXRvLWNhbGwmYWRkaXRpb25hbFt1dG1fY29udGVudF09Q0MtTFktMTAyNjE2LWRqdC1tZW1vLWluaC1qZmMtcHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wX0NDX0xZJmFtb3VudD0xMDA&K=_8v2k4Sr9Nq8Bslk7KM4Mg)

Over the past month, polls have _shown us winning_ **Iowa, Ohio, Maine, Florida, Nevada,** and**North Carolina.** If we maintain our leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral votes. Hillary can claim 193. _**But we 'd still have 4 electoral votes to go.**_

Polls show us _close_ in **New** **Hampshire** , **Colorado** , and **Pennsylvania**. Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory.

We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a $140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to victory.

###

Friend: with just 13 days left, we have a few paths to win. But we'll need your continued support.

**Because you 've been such a critical supporter, you'll also be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in.**

[**Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to help us stay on track to win just 13 days from today.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAwLWVhZjVhZTU5ZGUxMDQwOTY4ODQzYTIxMGEwYzY5ZDAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS90b28tY2xvc2UtdG8tY2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SkZDX2RpcmVjdC1hc2tfdG9vLWNsb3NlLXRvLWNhbGwmYWRkaXRpb25hbFt1dG1fY29udGVudF09Q0MtTFktMTAyNjE2LWRqdC1tZW1vLWluaC1qZmMtcHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wX0NDX0xZJmFtb3VudD0xMDA&K=1Wav0vmfyZIyo016OqpdiA)

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MzAwLWVhZjVhZTU5ZGUxMDQwOTY4ODQzYTIxMGEwYzY5ZDAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS90b28tY2xvc2UtdG8tY2FsbC8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SkZDX2RpcmVjdC1hc2tfdG9vLWNsb3NlLXRvLWNhbGwmYWRkaXRpb25hbFt1dG1fY29udGVudF09Q0MtTFktMTAyNjE2LWRqdC1tZW1vLWluaC1qZmMtcHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wX0NDX0xZJmFtb3VudD0xMDA&K=VJrcMf7olM_ud2P15iCJDg)**

name: John Gregg
subject: Will Peter be there?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
This weekend will be huge -- it has to be. With less than two weeks left, it's all hands on deck, including Peter.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3941083311941220352/-1761327966873843712?utm_campaign=fld_wacanv_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161026_fld_gq_wacanv_ful__jg)
---
Peter, I want to ask you personally: Will you help get out the vote this weekend? We have less than two weeks left. It's time for us to get all hands on deck. There are so many voters we have yet to reach, and so little time left to reach them. **[Will you do your part to get out the vote this weekend? Find a GOTV event near you and sign up now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3941083311941220352/-1761327966873843712?utm_campaign=fld_wacanv_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161026_fld_gq_wacanv_ful__jg)** This weekend will be huge -- it has to be. Canvassing is one of the single most effective ways to win votes. If we don't knock on doors, Indiana will lose. Even if you've never knocked on a door in your life, I'll make sure you have the tools you need to make a difference in this election. And with shifts available throughout the day, there's almost certainly a time that will work for you. **[Find a GOTV event near you this weekend, and sign up to do your part for Indiana.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3941083311941220352/-1761327966873843712?utm_campaign=fld_wacanv_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161026_fld_gq_wacanv_ful__jg)** See you this weekend! John

clean_body: This weekend will be huge -- it has to be. With less than two weeks left, it's all hands on deck, including Peter. | Peter, I want to ask you personally: Will you help get out the vote this weekend? We have less than two weeks left. It's time for us to get all hands on deck. There are so many voters we have yet to reach, and so little time left to reach them. This weekend will be huge -- it has to be. Canvassing is one of the single most effective ways to win votes. If we don't knock on doors, Indiana will lose. Even if you've never knocked on a door in your life, I'll make sure you have the tools you need to make a difference in this election. And with shifts available throughout the day, there's almost certainly a time that will work for you. See you this weekend! | **DESPERATION ALERT!**

**MINTER POLLING AGAIN TELEGRAPHS MORE DISHONEST ATTACKS**
Last night, after Phil’s decisive victory in the final televised debate, we started getting calls from Democratic supporters from throughout Vermont reporting a “survey” that was testing a range of dishonest statements and outright lies about Phil Scott, his positions, his plans and his record.

**Minter and her team are desperate to distract from the fact that she has no comprehensive plans to strengthen the economy and make Vermont affordable** (see Phil’s plan at[ www.PhilScott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9e389ca10c&e=19cebfe173)) and that Democrats all around the state are enthusiastically supporting Phil’s positive vision for Vermont. They also want to persuade people to ignore Minter’s support for new sales taxes, a new “cap and trade” fee on gasoline and diesel, a regional carbon tax on home heating and transportation fuel (she has also refused to say she’d veto a Vermont-only carbon tax), and fees on your checking account and ATM transactions.

**_So, as Election Day draws near -- and Minter’s team gets more desperate -- it’s important for the people of Vermont, and the press, to be aware of the dishonest statements Minter will be putting in mail, internet, television and radio advertisements as the election nears._** Vermonters know Phil; they know not to believe the negative ads; and they know that Phil Scott is the only candidate focused on growing the economy, making Vermont more affordable and restoring balance in Montpelier.

To ensure you know the truth, we’ve refuted Minter’s most egregious mistruths here: | **MINTER’S FICTION** | **PHIL SCOTT FACT**
---|---
|
**A Woman’s Right to Choose** | Sue Minter’s surrogates are telling a profoundly dishonest lie about a very important issue. Phil is unabashedly pro-choice, supports a woman’s right to choose and defended Planned Parenthood’s funding when national Republicans tried to defund the organization. Phil’s also raised two strong, independent daughters and believes strongly in a women’s right to choose. **Phil Scott is more more pro-choice than the Democratic nominee for Vice President, Sen. Tim Kaine. **
**Phil Scott vs. Donald Trump** | This one takes the cake. A year ago, Phil Scott was one of the very first elected officials -- in any party -- to say that he could not and would not support Donald Trump. **Phil’s consistency -- and willingness to put principles over politics -- stands in stark contrast to Sue Minter** who first supported Hillary Clinton over Vermont’s own Bernie Sanders.
**Higher Education & Family Leave**
| Phil is the only candidate telling the truth about Sue’s plans for “free” college and “free” paid family leave. And **the truth is, Sue Minter will make you pay by increasing your bank fees and your payroll taxes and the head of the Vermont Bankers Association confirmed it will be a job killer.** Phil is the only candidate who knows we can’t make the economy stronger and Vermont more affordable by increasing the costs of living and doing business here. And Vermonters know that when they hear a plan like Sue’s that sounds too good to be true, it undoubtedly is -- and that Sue Minter’s promises are the promises the current Governor made and was unable to keep.
**Climate Change**
| Phil believes the science: climate change is real and man-made. That’s why Phil is committed to achieving energy efficiency through solar and hydro with community input, rather than destroying our ridgelines with industrial wind turbines that are forced on communities that do not want them. ** Sue Minter will let her industrial wind donors continue to run roughshod over Vermont’s rural communities. **
**Phil’s Family Business** | Ok, let’s go over this one, again...

1) Phil has already said he will sell his company when he’s elected.

2) Sue Minter herself signed a number of these low-bid contracts.

3) Both the former Secretary of Transportation (Minter’s former boss) and the current Commissioner of Buildings and General Services have verified that no one can influence the contract process.

4) The state contract is open and fully transparent -- a fact that multiple public records requests have verified.

5) Sue Minter’s party has controlled the Legislature for more than a decade, they could easily have passed an ethics bill -- a proposal Phil Scott supports!

5) And again, Phil will sell his company if elected Governor.

**The very fact that Sue Minter would attack a family business with decades of integrity says all voters need to know about her opinion of small businesses in Vermont.**

###

Stratham

This is a great opportunity to visit a GOP Office and sign up to
get involved with less than 2 weeks to go.

Thanks!
