body:
Prepared by my campaign manager. Please read to see our path forward. |

Friend, I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for the White House and what we must do to lock in a win. If you don’t read the entire memo below, I’ve highlighted key points that you NEED to know. After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 13 days from today. BEFORE donating, you’ll also be able to indicate your preference for the state we invest your contribution in. TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager RE: Donald Trump’s Path to 270 Electoral Votes ________________________________________ Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the presidency. We’ve outlined a map to show where we currently stand as well as the possible paths forward to win. While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump. Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call. Over the past month, polls have shown us winning Iowa, Ohio, Maine, Florida, Nevada, and North Carolina. If we maintain our leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral votes. Hillary can claim 193. But we’d still have 4 electoral votes to go. Polls show us close in New Hampshire, Colorado, and Pennsylvania. Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory. We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a $140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to victory. Friend: with just 13 days left, we have a few paths to win. But we’ll need your continued support. Because you’ve been such a critical supporter, you’ll also be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 13 days from today. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager RE: Donald Trump’s Path to 270 Electoral Votes ______________________________________ Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the presidency. We’ve outlined a map to show where we currently stand as well as the possible paths forward to win. While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump. Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call. Over the past month, polls have shown us winning Iowa, Ohio, Maine, Florida, Nevada, and North Carolina. If we maintain our leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral votes. Hillary can claim 193. But we’d still have 4 electoral votes to go. Polls show us close in New Hampshire, Colorado, and Pennsylvania. Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory. We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a $140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to victory. Friend: with just 13 days left, we have a few paths to win. But we’ll need your continued support. name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: [HOUSE & SENATE] Toss-up races!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0bde/24c69fd9/bfabb57/18edd531/4182493730/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV69N_digital_email_20161026_HouseSenate_n-all&source=WPEFEV69N_digital_email_20161026_HouseSenate_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

We have just 13 days left before Election Day -- here's where we stand:

We have nine women running for the Senate, with six races to defeat GOP incumbents and a must-win race in Nevada to fend off Republicans' only pick-up opportunity. Four of these races -- Katie McGinty in Pennsylvania, Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, Deborah Ross in North Carolina, and Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire -- are _**pure toss-ups**_.

We also have 21 House seats where we can replace some truly terrible Republicans with pro-choice Democratic women. And eight of these races -- LuAnn Bennett (VA-10), Anna Throne-Holst (NY-01), Emily Cain (ME-02), Morgan Carroll (CO-06), Kim Myers (NY-22), Jacky Rosen (NV-03), Zephyr Teachout (NY-19), and Monica Vernon (IA-01) -- are _**pure toss-ups**_.

**[We can make all the difference in whether these races are victories or losses. Donate $3 to help these pro-choice Democratic women win in tight toss-ups.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0bde/24c69fd9/bfabb57/18edd532/4182493730/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161026_email_HouseSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+We+can+make+all+the+difference+in+whethe&utm_campaign=WPEFEV69N_digital_email_20161026_HouseSenate_n-all&source=WPEFEV69N_digital_email_20161026_HouseSenate_n-all")**

Everything comes down to the ground game in our toss-up races.

A strong get out the vote operation can nudge these races a few crucial points and put them over the top. And a weak ground game means that many of the voters who could've been in our corner won't hear from our candidates again.

I can tell you firsthand -- there's no worse feeling than having a great candidate and close race but just not having the resources to spread the word in the final days.

I want to make sure none of our toss-up races end up in that position -- and with your help, they won't.

**Donate $3 now to rush last-minute support to our candidates in close toss-up races:

[https://secure.emilyslist.org/House-And-Senate](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0bde/24c69fd9/bfabb57/18edd533/4182493730/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161026_email_HouseSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHouseAndSenate&utm_campaign=WPEFEV69N_digital_email_20161026_HouseSenate_n-all&source=WPEFEV69N_digital_email_20161026_HouseSenate_n-all")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0bde/24c69fd9/bfabb57/18edd52c/4182493730/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161026_email_HouseSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEV69N_digital_email_20161026_HouseSenate_n-all&source=WPEFEV69N_digital_email_20161026_HouseSenate_n-all")**

|
---|---|---

name: Team Ross
subject: a dumbbell that's too heavy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Have you ever attempted to lift something that was too heavy?

**That 's the kind of struggle Senator Burr is facing right now.** As an article in the _Washington Post_ said, Senator Burr is being weighed down on either side of the GOP ticket.

**On one side Senator Burr has Donald Trump, whom he still supports.** And on the other, he has Governor Pat McCrory, whose anti-business, pro-discrimination law he waited months to address.

That's some heavy stuff, for sure.

But here's the real anchor: North Carolinians are sick of a Senator who represents them in name only. [_**They want someone who represents them seriously and with fresh energy. They want Deborah. Help her win. She needs you in these last two weeks. Give $5 or $10.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427af/2cc31c44/5549c0e/19f9a5c4/1358878746/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161026pm?refcode=dre161026pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Republicans are not going to let Senator Burr flounder because if he loses, they lose their majority.

They are so panicked that they've thrown down an extra $2 million for ads over the last two weeks of the election. **They 're trying to rescue Burr by smearing Deborah's record.**

**We 've worked too hard to be defeated by a candidate whose only strength is his own party's fear of defeat. Don't let us be drowned out.**

[_**Rush in $5 or $10 if you can.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427af/2cc31c44/5549c0e/19f9a5c4/1358878746/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161026pm?refcode=dre161026pm_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team Ross |

name: Brian Schweitzer
subject: he's just making stuff up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Greg Gianforte is just making stuff up. And spending more than $5 million of his own money to do so. I've never seen anything like it.

Tomorrow at midnight, Steve has his last fundraising deadline of the campaign. **It 's up to all of us to make sure that this final report sends a strong message from Montanans. [Chip in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=EwzwIUWj%2FoMMf4iQ9uppoi3sWofa0EyN)**

Mr. Gianforte says he never filed suit against the state to block public stream access next to his mansion. **He did -- I was governor at the time.**

He dismisses criticism that he helped outsource American jobs and used special visas to hire foreign workers at his company. He built his company on outsourcing -- his own former Chief Operating Officer has confirmed this.

He claims to oppose a statewide sales tax but a new tape recently surfaced in which he called it the "best solution" for Montanans.

**Greg Gianforte is spending millions and millions of his own money to try to blanket over his past positions. All while taking his campaign straight into the gutter against Steve.**

Steve is still winning but this race is tight and campaigns are won or lost in the final few days. **I'm told he's $7,223 short of his final goal.[Please help and contribute $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=41jvuwEXFeBWGdfY0%2BQzdi3sWofa0EyN)**

Thanks,

Brian Schweitzer ****
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ny7NOLkXXeh%2FfmJZQ8FY6y3sWofa0EyN)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ogwex%2Br69JMA%2BG9imu%2Fkjy3sWofa0EyN).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
